name: Zoho CRM
description: Zoho CRM customer relationship management. Monitor user access, roles, profiles, and organization settings.

config.setupInstructions:
Connect your Zoho CRM account so Comp AI can monitor user access, roles, and organization settings.

When you click "Connect":
1. You will be redirected to Zoho
2. Sign in with the Zoho account that has access to your CRM
3. Authorize the requested read-only permissions
4. You will be redirected back here, ready to use

After connection, tokens auto-refresh — you will not need to reconnect periodically.

Note: Currently optimized for the Zoho US data center. If your Zoho account is in EU/India/Australia/etc., contact support — multi-region support is in progress.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Zoho CRM users and verifies their account status.

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that Zoho CRM has roles and profiles configured for access control.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the Zoho CRM API is accessible and returns organization information.
